subject: Fermi GBM trigger 141229739 is not a GRB
body:
V. Pelassa (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 441567881 / 141229739
at 17:44:38.22 UT on 29 December 2014, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
